title: The Wind Is My Lover
actors: Viveca Lindfors, Alf Kjellin, Edvin Adolphson
plot: In 14th Century Sweden, when Lorld Erland Maneskold marries Singoalla, a gypsy, he abandons his worldly possessions. The gypsies, who meanwhile have stolen the Maneskold treasure, want the couple to join their caravan to escape de...
